descFull: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework   built on Claude Code. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.
